name: devflow
description: Architecture-first workflow for large development projects with project-scoped constraints, task plans, and markdown artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Run architecture-first projects through architect, plan, dev, and review
interface.longDescription: Coordinate complex software projects through an explicit architecture baseline, task planning, implementation, and review workflow with persisted project and task state.
defaultPrompt: Use DevFlow to start a tracked project architecture baseline
Use DevFlow to start a task plan under the approved architecture
Resume the active DevFlow project and tell me the next action
